title: New PTSD Treatment Center Opens for IDF Veterans
summary: A new state-of-the-art rehabilitation center dedicated to post-trauma care for veterans has opened, offering innovative therapies not previously available in Israel.
content:
A new state-of-the-art rehabilitation center dedicated to post-trauma care for veterans has opened this week.

The center offers a range of innovative therapies, including physiological and technology-assisted approaches not previously available in Israel.

Genesis Friends For Life helped connect the initiative to international expertise and funding.
